message:
test(proptest): add 23 property tests for connector credential broker coverage gaps

Covers rule TTL override logic, overlapping rules, provider counter
consistency, lease ID monotonicity, audit log FIFO eviction, credential
active_lease_count through expiry, saturating TTL at u64::MAX, and mixed
lease state revocation. Total: 52 property tests (up from 29).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
